name: AI Marketing Suite
description: A comprehensive AI-powered marketing toolset with 15 specialized marketing skills using parallel subagents for website audit, copy generation, email sequencing, ad campaign creation, content calendaring, competitive intelligence, and client-ready PDF report generation.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to be audited or analyzed.

inputs.name: marketing_brief
inputs.description: Input text describing product, service, or campaign details for copy and content generation.

inputs.name: email_subjects
inputs.description: List of subject lines or themes for generating email sequences.

inputs.name: ad_campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Structured parameters including target audience, budget, goals, and platforms for ad campaign generation.

inputs.name: content_calendar_requirements
inputs.description: Details defining content scheduling needs such as frequency, channels, and types of posts.

inputs.name: competitive_intelligence_input
inputs.description: Information about competitors or market to analyze for competitive insights.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive audit report of a website highlighting marketing opportunities and issues.

outputs.name: copy_text
outputs.description: Generated marketing copy tailored to the input brief.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: Automated sequence of emails for marketing outreach.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Detailed plan and creative components for an ad campaign.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Structured schedule outlining content topics, dates, and channels.

outputs.name: competitive_report
outputs.description: Report on competitive intelligence analysis including strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.

outputs.name: client_ready_report
outputs.description: Polished, branded marketing report suitable for client presentation.

patterns: Parallel subagents architecture for multitask processing
Automated content and copy generation using AI models
Integration of website auditing with marketing insights
Template-based prompt engineering for consistent outputs
PDF report generation from marketing analysis and outputs
steps: Receive inputs including website URLs, marketing briefs, and campaign parameters
Run multiple marketing subagents in parallel specialized for auditing, copywriting, campaign planning, and analysis
Generate intermediate outputs like audit results, drafts of copy, email sequences, and competitive insights
Aggregate and format outputs into structured forms such as content calendars and campaign plans
Compile all relevant data and insights into client-ready branded PDF reports
Deliver generated materials for marketing strategy execution or client presentation
use_cases: Performing detailed marketing audits of client websites
Generating creative marketing copy and email sequences automatically
Planning and preparing digital ad campaigns using AI assistance
Creating organized content calendars for social media and blogs
Conducting competitive intelligence for market positioning
Producing professional marketing reports for clients

prompt_templates.name: website_audit_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify key marketing strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.

prompt_templates.name: copy_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate engaging marketing copy based on the following brief: {marketing_brief}

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create an email marketing sequence based on these subject lines: {email_subjects}

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop a detailed ad campaign plan for this target audience and budget: {ad_campaign_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a content calendar meeting these requirements: {content_calendar_requirements}

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the competitive landscape given this data: {competitive_intelligence_input}
